title: Nenjankoottil Lyrics Dishyum
stanzas:
#Nenjankoottil Song Lyrics From #Dishyum
#VijayAntony #Vairamuthu

hey nenjaankoottil
neeyae nirkiraai penne
nettri pottil
theeyai vaikkiraai

katti poattu kaathal
seigiraai muthugil
katterumbu poalae oorgiraai

kaathal dhaane..
ithu kaathal dhaane
unnai ninaippathai
niruthi vittaal,
nenju yenadi thudikkavillai

ennam yaavaiyum
azhithu vittaen,
innum poga marakkavillai..

nenjaankoottil
neeyae nirkiraai penne
nettri pottil
theeyai vaikkiraai

vinnai thudaikindra mugilai..
velli nilavai..
manjal natchathirathai..
ennai thedi mannil
varavazhaithu
unnai kaathalippathai
uraithaen..

indru pirakkindra poovukkum..
siru pullukkum..
kaathal uraithu mudithaen
ullam kaathalikkum
unakku mattum,
innum sollavillayae
illayae…

latcham pala latcham
ingu thaai mozhiyil
sollirukka
oththa chollu sikkavillai
yethanaalae..

panthi vacha veetukaari
paathiratha kazhuvittu
pattiniyaa kalaippaalae
athu polae..

hey nenjaankoottil
neeyae nirkiraai penne
nettri pottil
theeyai vaikkiraai

chinna chinna
chella kurumbum,
cheeni chiruppum,
yennai seerazhikkuthae..

viru viruvena valarum
pazham enthan
virathangalai velluthae..

unnai karam patri izhuthu
valai udaithu,
kaathal sollida solluthae…

vetkam iru pakkam
meesai mulaithu
yennai kuthi kuthiyae
kolluthae…

kaathal yendra
neethi vazhi,
kaiya veesi vantha pinnum
kal thadukka
kaathirukku yethanaalae?

february maathathukku
naalu onnu koodivara
aandu naalu kaathirukkum
athu polae…
nenjaankoottil..

nenjaankoottil
neeyae nirkiraai penne
nettri pottil
theeyai vaikkiraai

katti poattu kaathal
seigiraai muthugil
katterumbu poalae oorgiraai

kaathal dhaane..
ithu kaathal dhaane
unnai ninaippathai
niruthi vittaal,
nenju yenadi thudikkavillai

ennam yaavaiyum
azhithu vittaen,
innum poga marakkavillai..

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Nenjankoottil?

The song Nenjankoottil expresses deep romantic feelings and the essence of love, highlighting the emotional connection between lovers.

What is the context of this song in the movie Dishyum?

In Dishyum, the song plays during a pivotal romantic moment, showcasing the bond between the lead characters.

Who are the singers of Nenjankoottil?

The song is beautifully sung by Jayadev and Rajalakshmi.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for Nenjankoottil was composed by Vijay Antony, known for his unique sound and melodies.

When was the song released?

The song was released on February 2, 2006.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Nenjankoottil, the romantic duet encapsulates the feelings of love and longing between the protagonists in Dishyum. The soothing melodies and heartfelt lyrics by Vairamuthu evoke a sense of nostalgia and warmth. As Jayadev and Rajalakshmi's voices intertwine, listeners are taken on an emotional journey that reflects the beauty of love. This song is perfect for romantic occasions, making it a timeless favorite.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Nenjankoottil from the Dishyum soundtrack is a mesmerizing duet that beautifully captures the essence of love. With the enchanting voices of Jayadev and Rajalakshmi, paired with Vijay Antony's captivating music, this song is sure to tug at your heartstrings. Experience the magic of romance as the lyrics by Vairamuthu weave a tale of deep emotions and longing.
stanzaMeanings: Hey, in this heart's home, you are standing, girl, placing fire in the pot of offerings.
You are making love with a bond, like a pearl in a flower, you are blooming.
This is love... this is love. If I stop thinking of you, my heart won't stop beating.
I have lost all my feelings, I still can't forget and move on.
In this heart's home, you are standing, girl, placing fire in the pot of offerings.
The clouds that touch the sky... the silver moon... the yellow star... I called out to you, who came to this world, to express my love.
Today, even the flower that is born... and the little grass... my heart is filled with love for you, but I still haven't said it...
Many wishes are here, but they are not spoken in the mother's tongue, no matter how much I try...
Like a housewife who has prepared a feast, but is still waiting for the guests to arrive...
Hey, in this heart's home, you are standing, girl, placing fire in the pot of offerings.
Little, little treasures, sweet smiles, they are making me feel good...
The ripe fruit grows with sweetness, fulfilling my desires...
Writing about you, breaking the net, I am saying love...
With shame on one side, the mustache is growing, and I am being hurt little by little...
In the path of love, how many times will I wait for the hand to come and touch?
In February, four days will come together, and I will wait for four years, just like that...
In this heart's home...
In this heart's home, you are standing, girl, placing fire in the pot of offerings.
You are making love with a bond, like a pearl in a flower, you are blooming.
This is love... this is love. If I stop thinking of you, my heart won't stop beating.
I have lost all my feelings, I still can't forget and move on.
